headline: SCHD’s $85 Billion Strategy Now Concentrates 41 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
summary: A 63-year-old retiree with $400,000 parked in the Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) likely picked it for the 100-stock screen and the reliable income stream. The top 10 positions now make up 41% of the fund, which means roughly $164,000 of that nest egg sits in ten names. For a fund managing $94 billion, ... SCHD’s $85 Billion Strategy Now Concentrates 41 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks

headline: Lockheed Martin: Time To Pull The Trigger (Upgrade)
summary: Lockheed Martin is buy-rated as defense spending surges. LMT stock trades at a discount to the Industrials sector. See here for more analysis.
